title: bromus maximus var. asperipes
intro: Bromus maximus var. asperipes, also known as tall brome, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce fever. The health benefits of Bromus maximus var. asperipes include relief from respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma, and its herbal preparations have been used to treat various ailments, including wounds and skin conditions. In herbal medicine, the plant is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, and can be used externally as a poultice or applied topically as an ointment.
